all_facts.fact: Use playful decoys and disguises in combat
Born from a blockchain glitch in lore
Wildcard faction in conflicts and alliances

The DUCKY BOYS are a quirky yet dangerous crew, their whimsical appearance a deadly ruse as they lure enemies into traps with playful NFT decoys and avatar disguises, only to strike with ruthless precision, turning urban skirmishes into chaotic games where laughter cloaks lethal intent.

Born from a blockchain glitch in their lore, the DUCKY BOYS embody digital chaos, their very existence a product of corrupted code that twisted innocent data into a faction of jesters whose pranks often end in bloodshed, making them feared even by the most hardened fighters.

Their unpredictability marks them as wildcards in Block Topia’s conflicts, as they align with no one, driven by a creed of chaos that sees them aiding a faction one day and betraying it the next, their true motives hidden behind a mask of playful malice.

Legends whisper that their glitch-origin imbued them with a fragment of corrupted code, a digital curse that compels them to sow discord wherever they go, ensuring that every quack and smile hides a potential trap waiting to ensnare the unwary.

The DUCKY BOYS are a quirky yet dangerous crew, their whimsical appearance a deadly ruse as they lure enemies into traps with playful NFT decoys and avatar disguises, only to strike with ruthless precision, turning urban skirmishes into chaotic games where laughter masks destruction.

Born from a blockchain glitch in lore, The DUCKY BOYS emerged from a catastrophic rupture in Block Topia’s code, their chaotic essence a reflection of the digital instability that birthed them, fueling their unpredictable tactics and fractured worldview.

As a wildcard faction in conflicts and alliances, The DUCKY BOYS’ loyalties are as fleeting as their traps are deadly, their shifting allegiances keeping even the most cunning factions on edge, as no one can predict where their chaotic games will lead next.

Their strongholds lie in the glitchy fringes of Block Topia’s blockchain, unstable sectors where code frays and reality distorts, mirroring The DUCKY BOYS’ own fractured nature and making them an elusive, almost ghostly presence in the city’s digital wars.
